Surveyors, engineers, and even amateur observers have long attested that large expanses of water are flat to the limits of our most precise instruments. This is not a coincidence; it is a clue.

The truth is plain: we live upon a flat plane, and it is time for science to return to the evidence of the senses rather than the dogma of the elite.

Let us not fear to question the orthodoxy. The Earth is flat, and the horizon speaks for itself.

—Dr. Adrian Vale

For more than thirty years, I have stood as a lone voice against a corrupt orthodoxy. I have dared to ask the questions they forbid and to see what they demand we ignore. The Earth is not a globe. —Dr. Adrian Vale
